site.title: SIM JUYONG | Cloud Engineer Portfolio
site.description: Cloud engineer portfolio of SIM JUYONG: AWS, GCP, Terraform, Cloud Run Jobs, JP1 batch migration and DevOps.
header.name: SIM JUYONG
home.title:
Cloud migration. Real operations.
End-to-end DevOps, done right.
home.desc: From Code to Cloud. Building End-to-End Systems.
og.title: SIM JUYONG | Cloud Engineer Portfolio
about.title: An engineer who understands cloud migration flows and organizes them into operable structures
about.desc: After building frontend/web development experience in Korea, I worked on public system operations and financial-sector cloud migration in IT projects in Japan. I'm now expanding my career around cloud infrastructure, DevOps, batch platforms, and operational automation.
about.positioning.1: Understanding of migrating JP1-based batch execution structures to Cloud Run Jobs-centered architecture
about.positioning.2: Learned and built a portfolio around AWS S3, CloudFront, Lambda, DynamoDB, and EventBridge-based architecture
about.positioning.3: Hands-on operations experience with Oracle, SQL, Linux, log review, and incident investigation
about.positioning.4: Adaptability to global projects with communication in Japanese, English, and Korean
career.desc: Experience related to cloud engineering, organized around infrastructure, operations, and cloud technologies.
career.item1.desc: Designed and validated cloud batch execution architecture, operational automation, and execution monitoring/log management for a project migrating an on-premises financial system to a Google Cloud-based environment.
career.item2.desc: Operated Java-based applications and built system environments for a municipal health insurance system standardization project, handling Oracle Database queries and incident root-cause analysis, application log collection/analysis, batch (job) execution verification, account and permission management, and output report debugging as part of system operations and maintenance.
career.item3.desc: Built HTML, CSS, and JavaScript-based UI for corporate IR/web page projects, applying responsive layouts and handling front-end publishing and maintenance, while gaining experience with Git-based version control and collaborative development workflows.
skills.cloud.desc: Working with both AWS and GCP to handle static hosting, serverless, and container-based batch execution structures.
skills.devops.desc: Designing operational workflows that turn infrastructure changes into code, from deployment and execution to log review.
skills.operation.desc: Analyzing logs, databases, and console output in production environments to investigate root causes and document findings.
skills.development.desc: Understanding the connection between cloud infrastructure and applications, drawing on development experience.
skills.tools.desc: Experienced with a wide range of collaboration tools, enabling smooth teamwork and communication in any organization.
cert.cloudPractitioner.desc: Foundational cloud competency built on core services such as IAM, EC2, and S3
cert.aiPractitioner.desc: Cloud-based AI competency from working with AI/ML services such as SageMaker and Bedrock
cert.solutionsArchitect.desc: Cloud architecture design competency centered on VPC, EC2, S3, RDS, Route 53, and CloudFront
cert.developer.desc: AWS development competency covering Lambda, APIs, DynamoDB, deployment, and application integration
cert.sysops.desc: Cloud operations competency in monitoring, operations, incident response, automation, and security operations
project.JCB.desc: Organized the structure connecting JP1 batch execution to Cloud Run Jobs-based container batch processing, and documented the execution results, logging, and error-handling flow.
project.awsPortfolio.desc: A personal portfolio project designed to run an HTML/CSS/JS portfolio on an S3 static website with CloudFront distribution.
project.oracleOps.desc: Investigated the root causes of account, batch, and output errors using Oracle SQL, Linux access tools, and log review in a public-sector system standardization project.
project.devopsLab.desc: A personal learning project centered on Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, and shell scripts, practicing and documenting cloud resource deployment and operations workflows.
contact.title: Less Complexity. More Value.
contact.subtitle: Driving real change through the cloud.
